major.title: Major
major.description: Most common scale in Western music, foundation for classical and popular music

natural_minor.title: Natural Minor
natural_minor.description: Most common minor scale, used in classical music and jazz

blues.title: Blues
blues.description: Characteristic scale of blues, with a flat fifth

major_pentatonic.title: Major Pentatonic
major_pentatonic.description: Five-note scale, widely used in rock and blues

minor_pentatonic.title: Minor Pentatonic
minor_pentatonic.description: Most common pentatonic scale, used in rock, blues, and jazz

dorian.title: Dorian
dorian.description: Modal scale, used in modern music and jazz

mixolydian.title: Mixolydian
mixolydian.description: Modal scale, used in blues and rock

phrygian.title: Phrygian
phrygian.description: Modal scale with a minor second

eolian.title: Aeolian
eolian.description: Modal scale equivalent to the natural minor
